name: Complete Blood Count
purpose: Anemia, infection, blood cells, platelets, and oxygen transport context.

name: Comprehensive Metabolic Panel / Biochemistry
purpose: Liver, kidney, electrolytes, glucose context, and general metabolic state.

name: Fasting Insulin
purpose: Insulin resistance context when interpreted with glucose and clinical context.

name: Lipid Panel
purpose: Total cholesterol, LDL-C, HDL-C, and triglycerides.

name: Ferritin / Iron / Transferrin Saturation
purpose: Iron status, fatigue, anemia, and performance context.

name: Vitamin D 25(OH)D
purpose: Vitamin D status, especially relevant in low-light environments such as Ireland.

name: B12 / Folate
purpose: Neurological health, methylation context, and anemia context.

name: TSH / Free T4 / Free T3 if needed
Creatinine / eGFR / Cystatin C if needed
purpose: Kidney function and protein/supplement safety context.

name: ALT / AST / GGT / Bilirubin / ALP
purpose: Liver function and fatty liver context.
